{

    "textinspector_level_raw": null,

    "Meets sentence count requirement (approx 11 sentences).",
    "Addresses prompt with relevant tips on time management."
  ],

  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "is the tips -> are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "time to TV -> time on TV (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "leave from -> leave (Lexis; A2; Medium)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "I hope, my tips -> I hope my tips (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
    "at personal messages -> in personal messages (Grammar; A2; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {
        "excerpt": "simular",
        "correction": "similar",
        "comment": "Spelling error of common adjective.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "enought",
        "correction": "enough",
        "comment": "Spelling error of common quantifier.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "leave from",
        "correction": "leave",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition with verb 'leave'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {
        "excerpt": "is the tips",
        "correction": "are the tips",
        "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error (plural subject).",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "this apps",
        "correction": "these apps",
        "comment": "Demonstrative pronoun agreement error (plural noun).",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "time to TV",
        "correction": "time on TV",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition with 'spend time'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "at personal messages",
        "correction": "in personal messages",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition for communication channel.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {
        "excerpt": "I hope, my tips",
        "correction": "I hope my tips",
        "comment": "Unnecessary comma after introductory clause.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [
      {
        "excerpt": "i",
        "correction": "I",
        "comment": "Lowercase 'i' is incorrect in English.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A1"
      }
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {
      "item": "Clear numbered list structure",
      "cefr_level": "B1",
      "category": "Rhetorical feature",
      "note": "Organizes advice logically with distinct points."
    },
    {
      "item": "Topic-specific vocabulary",
      "cefr_level": "B1",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Uses 'social media', 'calendars', 'energy' appropriately for context."
    },
    {
      "item": "Polite closing",
      "cefr_level": "B1",
      "category": "Rhetorical feature",
      "note": "Includes offer for further contact ('For more information...')."
    }
  ],
  "feedback": "Level A2. Key patterns: frequent basic agreement errors (is/are, this/these) and preposition misuse (time on, leave from). Strengths: clear structure, relevant vocab. Methodology: Rule 1.3 (lower level for reliability).",
  "next_steps": [
    "Review subject-verb agreement (is/are, this/these).",
    "Practice prepositions with common verbs (spend time on, leave groups).",
    "Proofread for spelling (similar, enough)."
  ]
}
